title: Build mission-critical workloads on Azure
summary: Learn how to design highly reliable, available, and resilient workloads in Azure. Apply core design principles to workloads that typically target maximum uptime.

sections.title: Build mission-critical workloads on Azure
sections.summary: Learn how to design highly reliable, available, and resilient workloads in Azure. Apply core design principles to workloads that typically target maximum uptime.

lessons.title: Challenge Project - Design a mission-critical web application
lessons.content_md:
Learn to apply key principles in your workload to achieve a highly reliable design with health monitoring checks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-mission-critical/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Challenge Project - Design a mission-critical web application

lessons.title: Design a health model for your mission-critical workload
lessons.content_md:
Improve your observability practices by defining a health model for mission-critical applications. A health model helps you quickly identify and troubleshoot issues that might affect the health of your mission-critical solution.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/design-health-model-mission-critical-workload/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Design a health model for your mission-critical workload

lessons.title: Continuously validate and test mission-critical workloads
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to automate Azure Load Testing and Azure Chaos Studio simultaneously as part of your CI/CD pipelines.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/continuous-validate-test-mission-critical-workloads/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Continuously validate and test mission-critical workloads

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Build mission-critical workloads on Azure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Build mission-critical workloads on Azure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
